mapper.select: SELECT * FROM domain_event WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId} AND (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = FALSE)
SELECT * FROM domain_event WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId} AND entity_id = #{entityId} AND (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = FALSE)
SELECT * FROM domain_event WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId} AND event_type = #{eventType} AND (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = FALSE)
